title: ITALY enforcement action against Ciemme S.r.l.s. (1,000)
summary: Insufficient cooperation with supervisory authority The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,000 on Ciemme S.r.l.s. The DPA began investigating the controller for potential GDPR infringements relating to direct marketing activities. The DPA therefore contacted the controller, who failed to adequately respond to the DPA's request. Legal...
